name: Æther Quarterly
description: Editorial magazine theme. Numbered side rail, sectioned landing (cover, features, essay, gallery, masthead), and a long-form post layout with reading progress and drop caps.

primary.title: Section nav
primary.description: Top section nav rendered as small-caps links beneath the masthead

footer.title: Footer links
footer.description: Compact footer link list under the colophon

sidebar.title: Sidebar widgets
sidebar.description: Right-rail widget stack on category, tag, and archive routes

issue_label.title: Issue Label
issue_label.description: Short label shown in the masthead and cover.

issue_season.title: Issue Season
issue_season.description: Season or date label shown near the cover title.

brand_mark.title: Brand Mark
brand_mark.description: Short mark shown before the wordmark.

brand_word.title: Brand Word
brand_word.description: Wordmark text shown in the header.

cover_headline_prefix.title: Cover Headline Prefix
cover_headline_prefix.description: Text before the emphasized cover word.

cover_headline_emphasis.title: Cover Headline Emphasis
cover_headline_emphasis.description: Emphasized cover headline word or phrase.

cover_headline_suffix.title: Cover Headline Suffix
cover_headline_suffix.description: Text after the emphasized cover word.

cover_photo_credit.title: Cover Photo Credit
cover_photo_credit.description: Small credit line shown on the cover image.

features_label.title: Features Label
features_label.description: Eyebrow label for the feature grid.

features_link_label.title: Features Link Label
features_link_label.description: Archive link label near the feature grid.

essay_label.title: Essay Label
essay_label.description: Eyebrow label for the essay section.

essay_page_marker.title: Essay Page Marker
essay_page_marker.description: Decorative page marker for the essay section.

gallery_label.title: Gallery Label
gallery_label.description: Eyebrow label for the gallery section.

gallery_credit.title: Gallery Credit
gallery_credit.description: Small credit line near the gallery heading.

subscribe_label.title: Subscribe Label
subscribe_label.description: Eyebrow label for the subscription section.

subscribe_heading.title: Subscribe Heading
subscribe_heading.default: Four issues a year, delivered by post.

subscribe_note.title: Subscribe Note
subscribe_note.default: Printed on uncoated stock, hand-stitched, and sent the long way round.

subscribe_price.title: Subscribe Price
subscribe_price.description: Small subscription note shown below the demo signup field.

colophon_editor.title: Colophon Editor
colophon_editor.description: Editor line in the colophon section.

colophon_art_director.title: Colophon Art Director
colophon_art_director.description: Art director line in the colophon section.

colophon_photography.title: Colophon Photography
colophon_photography.description: Photography line in the colophon section.

colophon_type.title: Colophon Type
colophon_type.description: Type system line in the colophon section.

colophon_printer.title: Colophon Printer
colophon_printer.description: Printer line in the colophon section.

colophon_established.title: Colophon Established
colophon_established.description: Established line in the colophon section.
